steps.title: Use the zero at x = -9 to find a relationship
steps.content:
Since $f(x) = ax + b$ (linear), we have $g(x) = \frac{ax + b}{x + 4}$. The table shows $g(-9) = 0$, which means the numerator equals zero: $f(-9) = 0$.
$$a(-9) + b = 0$$
$$b = 9a$$

steps.title: Use the value at x = -24 to solve for a and b
Find the y-intercept
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = 4x + 36$. At $x = 0$:
$$f(0) = 4(0) + 36 = 36$$
The y-intercept is $(0, 36)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
